title: Construction Excavator Car Toy for Boys Kids Toy Digger Truck with Electric Universal Wheel Educational Toys Present with Lights and Sounds for 3+ Years Old
features: Universal travel: a universal wheel is installed at the bottom of the vehicle that automatically changes the direction of travel when it hits an obstacle while driving. The arm of this sand toy excavator can be adjusted from top to bottom. Play this construction vehicle, can improve the child's hand and eye ability. (Reminder: On the bottom of the excavator there are swivel wheels. Remove the protective cover of the swivel wheels before playing)

With sound and light: with flashing lights and different sound effects. Different sounds can be used on different scenes. The body can be illuminated in many places, the light changes colour in the rhythm of the music and the light effect is more noticeable, soft and non-irritating light protects children's visual development

Automatic pivoting of the digging arm: after a certain driving time, the excavator stops temporarily and swings the grave arm up and down to simulate the excavation work. Children can take on the role of architects and play with their friends. Train your imagination and communication skills. WARNING: The digger arm cannot be adjusted manually, this is an automatic electronic toy
Product size: 11 in x 4 in x 4.8 in. Material: plastic. Durable; safe and non-toxic. For playing in the garden; outdoors or indoors

Present for children: warning: the digger arm cannot be adjusted manually, this is an automatic electronic toy. For birthday present; party present for boys and girls. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, lawn; patio; living room; nursery and other places
description: Product Description Looking for a fun and safe way to let your kids play? Look no further than the Kiztoys excavator toy with automatic extension! Made from high-quality, plastic, our excavator toy is both safe and durable. It's also meeting the CE certification standards of the European Union. But it's not just fun – it's also educational. Your child can play pretend engineer, learning about the construction and function of an excavator while having a blast. And with our toy, they can improve their imagination, creativity, and motor skills, all while enjoying themselves. So why wait? Get our excavator toy with automatic extension today and see the excitement on your child's face! Note: The automatic walking function is only suitable for smooth floors, and the excavator arm can only dig on its own and cannot be operated automatically. Please note that our excavator toy with automatic extension has some limitations. The automatic walking function is only suitable for smooth floors, so please avoid using it on rough or uneven surfaces. Additionally, while our toy excavator can dig on its own, the arm cannot be operated automatically. But don't let that stop you from having fun – with its durable construction, educational value, and exciting features, our excavator toy is sure to delight children of all ages! Universal Travel. At the bottom of the vehicle, there is a universal wheel installed that automatically changes the direction of travel when it encounters an obstacle. The arm of this sand excavator toy can be adjusted from top to bottom. Playing with this construction vehicle can improve children's hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills. Reminder: There are swivel wheels located at the bottom of the excavator. Please remove the protective cover of the swivel wheels before playing. Steps for use. Step 1: Opening the box, align the digging arm with the groove on the hull and insert Step 2: Remove the universal wheel guard on the underside of the vehicle body. Step 3: Unscrew the screws on the bottom and insert three AA batteries (not included). Step 4: The excavator can start working after turning on the red switch button below.
